verses.text: Paul, 'called to be an apostle,' greets 'the church of God which is at Corinth' with grace and peace. A holy people. Even a troubled church is owned as God's.
Paul, 'called to be an apostle,' greets 'the church of God which is at Corinth' with grace and peace. A holy people. Even a troubled church is owned as God's.
Paul, 'called to be an apostle,' greets 'the church of God which is at Corinth' with grace and peace. A holy people. Even a troubled church is owned as God's.
He thanks God for the grace given them, 'enriched... in all utterance, and in all knowledge.' Gifted. He begins by praising what God has wrought.
He thanks God for the grace given them, 'enriched... in all utterance, and in all knowledge.' Gifted. He begins by praising what God has wrought.
He thanks God for the grace given them, 'enriched... in all utterance, and in all knowledge.' Gifted. He begins by praising what God has wrought.
Ye 'come behind in no gift,' awaiting the Lord's coming; 'God is faithful.' Kept by God. He who called them will confirm them to the end.
Ye 'come behind in no gift,' awaiting the Lord's coming; 'God is faithful.' Kept by God. He who called them will confirm them to the end.
Ye 'come behind in no gift,' awaiting the Lord's coming; 'God is faithful.' Kept by God. He who called them will confirm them to the end.
He pleads for unity, for there are contentions, each saying, 'I am of Paul... of Apollos.' Sad division. Party spirit splits the church.
He pleads for unity, for there are contentions, each saying, 'I am of Paul... of Apollos.' Sad division. Party spirit splits the church.
He pleads for unity, for there are contentions, each saying, 'I am of Paul... of Apollos.' Sad division. Party spirit splits the church.
Is Christ divided? was Paul crucified for you? He is glad he baptized few. Christ alone. No man is the church's saviour or head.
Is Christ divided? was Paul crucified for you? He is glad he baptized few. Christ alone. No man is the church's saviour or head.
Is Christ divided? was Paul crucified for you? He is glad he baptized few. Christ alone. No man is the church's saviour or head.
Is Christ divided? was Paul crucified for you? He is glad he baptized few. Christ alone. No man is the church's saviour or head.
Christ sent him to preach, not with 'wisdom of words,' lest the cross be made void; 'the preaching of the cross... is the power of God.' The cross. Plain preaching, not eloquence, saves.
Christ sent him to preach, not with 'wisdom of words,' lest the cross be made void; 'the preaching of the cross... is the power of God.' The cross. Plain preaching, not eloquence, saves.
God destroys the wisdom of the wise; 'by the foolishness of preaching to save them that believe.' God's way. He saves by what the world calls folly.
God destroys the wisdom of the wise; 'by the foolishness of preaching to save them that believe.' God's way. He saves by what the world calls folly.
God destroys the wisdom of the wise; 'by the foolishness of preaching to save them that believe.' God's way. He saves by what the world calls folly.
Jews seek a sign, Greeks wisdom; 'we preach Christ crucified,' the power and wisdom of God. The one message. The cross is God's wisdom, though men scorn it.

Jews seek a sign, Greeks wisdom; 'we preach Christ crucified,' the power and wisdom of God. The one message. The cross is God's wisdom, though men scorn it.
Jews seek a sign, Greeks wisdom; 'we preach Christ crucified,' the power and wisdom of God. The one message. The cross is God's wisdom, though men scorn it.
Not many wise or noble are called; God chose the foolish and weak, 'that no flesh should glory in his presence.' Lowly chosen. God humbles human pride by His choice.
Not many wise or noble are called; God chose the foolish and weak, 'that no flesh should glory in his presence.' Lowly chosen. God humbles human pride by His choice.
Not many wise or noble are called; God chose the foolish and weak, 'that no flesh should glory in his presence.' Lowly chosen. God humbles human pride by His choice.
Not many wise or noble are called; God chose the foolish and weak, 'that no flesh should glory in his presence.' Lowly chosen. God humbles human pride by His choice.
Of Him are ye in Christ, made 'wisdom... righteousness... sanctification, and redemption'; 'let him glory in the Lord.' All in Christ. He is everything to His people.
